page_content:
Prerequisite: ENCE300.

ENCE751 Chemistry of Natural Waters II (3 Credits)

A continuation of ENCE651, introducing aquatic chemical kinetics and chemistry of the solid-water interface.

Prerequisite: ENCE650 and ENCE651.

ENCE799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) ENCE898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) ENCE899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)
